pi_items.metadata_value: NCBI Nucleotide J02459.1 (Enterobacteria phage lambda, complete genome)
pi_items.verified_value: NCBI Nucleotide J02459.1 or fallback NC_001416.1

pi_items.source: Biopython restriction digest of the downloaded J02459.1 genome. The wild-type genome produces 12 fragments.

Biopython restriction digest of the downloaded J02459.1 genome, cross-referenced with NEB documentation. The 1584 and 125 bp fragments are specific to the cI857 ind1 Sam7 mutant marker strain, not the wild-type J02459.1 genome (which leaves them joined as a single 1709 bp fragment).

privileged_info_summary: The task involves an in silico double restriction digest (EcoRI and HindIII) of the wild-type Lambda phage genome (J02459.1) downloaded directly from NCBI. A critical contradiction was discovered: the task expects 13 fragment sizes specifically corresponding to a commercial mutant marker strain (λ cI857 ind1 Sam7, which contains an extra HindIII cut site yielding 1584 bp and 125 bp fragments). However, the wild-type J02459.1 genome downloaded by the setup script lacks this mutation and correctly produces only 12 fragments (where the 1584 and 125 bp fragments remain joined as a single 1709 bp fragment). This contradiction permanently prevents an agent from successfully achieving a perfect score on the verifier without fabricating the 13th fragment or overriding the data.
